caption: The video captures a live broadcasting setup for an event titled "#BigDataSV 2015," which took place at the Fairmont San Jose on February 18, 19, and 20, 2015. The scene features a professional camera mounted on a tripod, positioned to record the event. Behind the camera, there is a large poster providing details about the event, including the hosts—Dave Vellante, John Furrier, and Jeff Kelly—and a list of speakers and guests. The poster also mentions "theCUBE Special Event" scheduled for 5pm-7pm on February 18, 2015. The setting suggests a well-organized conference or seminar focused on big data, with continuous coverage planned throughout the three days. The environment appears to be indoors, likely within a conference hall or similar venue, designed to facilitate discussions and presentations on the latest trends and innovations in big data technology.
